    R

    read() - Method in class com.utils.ScriptInputStream
    Reads a single character from the input stream.
    readDataPathsFromEnv() - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
    Reads the list of data file paths from the environment configuration file.
    reconnect() - Method in class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Attempts to reconnect to the server.
    reconnect(int) - Method in class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Attempts to reconnect to the server with specified number of attempts.
    RemoveByBestAlbum(String) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Removes a music band from the collection by its best album name.
    RemoveByBestAlbumCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for removing a music band by its best album name.
    RemoveByBestAlbumCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.RemoveByBestAlbumCommand
     
    RemoveById(Long) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Removes a music band from the collection by its unique ID.
    RemoveByIdCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for removing a music band from the collection by its ID.
    RemoveByIdCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.RemoveByIdCommand
     
    removeElByBestAlbum(String) - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Removes a music band from the collection based on its best album name.
    removeElById(Long) - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Removes a music band from the collection by its unique ID.
    removeElementsGreaterThanId(Long) - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Removes all music bands from the collection that have an ID greater than the specified value.
    RemoveGreaterThanId(Long) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Removes all music bands from the collection that have an ID greater than the specified value.
    RemoveGreaterThanIdCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for removing all music bands with ID greater than a specified value.
    RemoveGreaterThanIdCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.RemoveGreaterThanIdCommand
     
    Request - Class in com.common
    Represents a request sent from client to server.
    Request() - Constructor for class com.common.Request
    Default constructor required for deserialization.
    Request(Request.RequestType, String) - Constructor for class com.common.Request
    Constructor for requests without arguments.
    Request(Request.RequestType, String, Map) - Constructor for class com.common.Request
    Constructor for requests with arguments.
    Request.RequestType - Enum Class in com.common
    Enum defining all possible request types.
    RequestHandler - Class in com.server.network
    Handles incoming requests and routes them to the appropriate handler.
    RequestHandler() - Constructor for class com.server.network.RequestHandler
    Creates a new RequestHandler with a new CommandRegistry.
    resolvePath(String) - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
    Resolves a file path, expanding the tilde (~) to the user's home directory.
    Response - Class in com.common
    Represents a response sent from server back to client.
    Response() - Constructor for class com.common.Response
    Default constructor required for deserialization.
    Response(boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.common.Response
    Constructor for a successful response.
    Response(boolean, String, String) - Constructor for class com.common.Response
    Constructor for a response with both result and error.
